description_long: This object is a Sony Xperia mobile phone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and a blue exterior. The front features a large black screen bordered by a thin bezel, with the 'SONY' logo and a front-facing camera at the top. The back is marked by the 'XPERIA' branding and a single camera lens with flash in the upper left corner. The sides are slim, with a visible metallic button on the right edge, likely for power or volume control. The phone's surface appears smooth and hard, with a glossy finish that reflects light. The overall design is modern and minimalist, suitable for everyday urban use.
description: A blue Sony Xperia smartphone with a large black screen, single rear camera, and sleek, glossy finish. Branding and a metallic side button add to its modern, minimalist look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black screen, 'SONY' logo, and front-facing camera at the top.
description_view_1: Right edge view highlighting the phone's slim profile and a metallic button near the center.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the 'XPERIA' branding, 'XX' model mark, and a single camera with flash in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Left edge view showing the slim, uninterrupted blue side with no visible buttons or features.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'SONY' logo is present at the top center of the front above the screen in white text, and 'XPERIA' is centered on the back in black text.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen is completely black, indicating it is turned off or in standby mode with no visible content or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: There is a single camera lens with a flash located in the top left corner on the back of the phone.
attribute_button_layout: A single metallic button is visible on the right edge, likely serving as a power or volume button.
